headline: Capital One Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: MCLEAN, Va., May 08, 2026--Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) today announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share payable June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on May 19, 2026. The company has announced dividends on its common stock every quarter since it became an independent company on February 28, 1995. Dividends declared by the company are eligible for direct reinvestment in the company's common stock under its Dividend Reinvestment and Stock

headline: A Look At Capital One (COF) Valuation As Growth Expectations Clash With Rich P/E Multiple
summary: Capital One Financial: context for recent stock performance Capital One Financial (COF) has been drawing attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with a decline year to date and over the past 3 months, alongside a gain over the past year. See our latest analysis for Capital One Financial. headline: Not Capital One, Not Bank Of America: JD Power Says This Credit Card Issuer Leads In Customer Satisfaction
summary: When it comes to credit card perks, rewards and point aren't the only thing you should consider. In fact, customer satisfaction could be more important.

headline: Capital One Financial Has Five Preferreds For An Investor's Wallet
summary: Explore Capital One (COF) preferred stocks: BB-rated ~6.6% yields, strong dividend coverage, low default/call risk.

headline: Capital One Redefines Its Role In Payments And Fintech Transformation
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has completed its acquisition of Discover Financial, reshaping its position in payments and credit cards. The company is entering fintech through the purchase of Brex, expanding into software driven financial tools for businesses. New initiatives aimed at Millennial and Gen Z customers signal a push into younger, digitally focused segments. For investors watching NYSE:COF, these moves come with the stock at a share price of $192.59 and a mixed return...
